working_on: Pairing C: adopt project-wired /review (five-axis) + /security-review (OWASP Top 10) skills via ADRs 0070 + 0071; closes Issues #73 and #74.
outcome_summary: Pairing C closed: 2 skills (.claude/skills/review/ + .claude/skills/security-review/) + 2 engine ADRs (0070 + 0071) + 2 MemPalace decision drawers (drawer_paideia_decisions_2b9e033d851700b20d60c6e3 for ADR 0070; drawer_paideia_decisions_bf3fab49f688860f65262981 for ADR 0071) + STATE.md + ENGINE_LOG.md + ADR README index. Issues #73 + #74 closed with ADR-pointer comments. Pattern source addyosmani/agent-skills (adapted, not cloned). Per pushback drawer + per decision drawer applied at planning time: Issue body assertions about first-exercise readiness note overridden by explicit ADR 0053 four-criteria rubric evaluation in each new ADR (zero criteria satisfied per skill -> no readiness note required, mirroring ADR 0069 precedent at S-0133 per decision drawer drawer_paideia_decisions_7c224ba73ed8f9ef34699402). Three Paideia overlays in /review: scope_lock awareness (ADR 0051), ADR-citation requirement, MemPalace decision-drawer check (ADR 0043 PostToolUse hook context). Three Paideia overlays in /security-review: Supabase RLS semantic verification (extends validate.py structural soft-warn), ADR 0055 Layer 2.5 postcondition-assertion semantic adequacy (per amendment landed at S-0094), MemPalace+KG PII discipline (timely given S-0130 OSS-flip per ADR 0065 product). Defense-in-depth orthogonality named: gitleaks (ADR 0067) + bandit (ADR 0068) + Dependabot (ADR 0069) + /security-review (ADR 0071) — no layer substitutes for another. Anti-rationalization table shared canonical location at review/anti-rationalization.md; security-review references it. Three commits: eager-claim + deliverable batch + closeout. ADR count 71 -> 73 (engine 34 -> 36; product unchanged 37; Accepted 67 -> 69; Superseded unchanged 4).
